implemented_changes.change: Infer document_time_status active for the Fordham Road Bus Lane Redesign Initiative only when the payload has the exact project name, bus_lane_redesign type, bus_lane family, update wording, and NYCT/Richard Davey update context.
guards: No broad status inference from the word update alone.
No family rewrite for the remaining project_family other records.
No hand edits were made to canonical JSONL; canonical outputs were regenerated by deterministic materialize.

subagents.finding: Found no high-confidence project_family other rewrites and exactly one safe missing document_time_status fix: the Fordham Road Bus Lane Redesign update record.

route_project_duplicate_identity_status.answer: Yes. Duplicate project and route issues have been fixed where deterministic evidence supports an alias or guard; they are separate from ontology other/missing cleanup.

rough_display_label_collisions.note: These are not automatically duplicate bugs. Current examples include route variants, phases, agency-specific projects, or aggregate/scope surfaces that need identity-policy review before any merge.

remaining.next_duplicate_lane: If prioritizing duplicate project/route cleanup, rebaseline the rough route/project display-label collisions and implement only aliases or do-not-merge guards where source context proves same or distinct identity.
